# Validation Checklist

## Before coding

- [ ] Read relevant `/docs` research.
- [ ] Record which `/docs` files were checked.
- [ ] Confirm implementation does not conflict with `/docs` decisions.
- [ ] Check actual project Gradle/source-set structure.
- [ ] Identify MVP boundary.
- [ ] Identify platform impact.

## Before adding content

- [ ] Source is official/high trust.
- [ ] Reuse rights checked or content is safely derived/paraphrased.
- [ ] Jurisdiction assigned.
- [ ] License class assigned.
- [ ] Category assigned.
- [ ] Correct answer verified.
- [ ] Explanation verified.
- [ ] Duplicate check done.
- [ ] Review status set.

## Before merging feature

- [ ] Code compiles in relevant source set.
- [ ] Tests added/updated.
- [ ] No architecture boundary violation.
- [ ] No backend/subscription creep.
- [ ] UI states complete.
- [ ] Navigation uses coordinator/typed routes.
- [ ] Data models do not leak SQLDelight rows.

## Before release

- [ ] Android tested.
- [ ] iOS tested.
- [ ] Offline mode tested.
- [ ] First-launch import tested.
- [ ] Existing-user migration tested.
- [ ] Privacy/legal/settings reviewed.
- [ ] Store screenshots use original assets.
- [ ] Government non-affiliation disclaimer present.
